# Description

# [PKT-LFC-013](task-0045): Converge Fresh-Install and Release-Bootstrap on Baseline Sync

## Purpose

Converge fresh-install and release-bootstrap on baseline sync.

## Scope

- Convergence logic
- Sync integration
- Validation

## Implementation

1. Implement convergence
2. Integrate sync
3. Validate

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Converged correctly
2. Sync integrated
3. Validated
